languages.text: {n}Мартинакс поворачивает к вам лицо, не прекращая орудовать инъектором.{/n} "Этот молодой человек получил серьезную травму головы, которая требовала ургентного вмешательства. Мы с генетором маджорис пытаемся остановить некротизацию плоти и выбрать стратегию дальнейшего врачевания".

traits.locale_text: "Прошу прощения, Лорд-капитан. Молодой человек на столе получил серьезную травму головы, она требует срочного оперативного вмешательства. Нам с коллегой Аугментатором удалось предотвратить отмирание плоти, но требуется выбрать стратегию дальнейшего лечения. Здесь у нас возникли... Существенные разногласия".

languages.text: {n}Still working the injector, Martinax turns his head to you.{/n} "This young man has suffered a serious head injury that requires immediate intervention. The Genetor Majoris and I are attempting to stop the flesh from dying off while simultaneously deciding on a strategy for further treatment."
languages.original_text: {n}Мартинакс поворачивает к вам лицо, не прекращая орудовать инъектором.{/n} "Этот молодой человек получил серьезную травму головы, которая требовала ургентного вмешательства. Мы с генетором маджорис пытаемся остановить некротизацию плоти и выбрать стратегию дальнейшего врачевания".

traits.locale_text: {n}Martinax turns his head to you, still working his injector.{/n} "This young man has suffered a serious head injury that requires immediate intervention. The Genetor Majoris and I are attempting to stop the flesh from dying off while simultaneously deciding on a strategy for further treatment."

{n}Still working the injector, Martinax turns his head to you.{/n} "This young man has suffered a serious head injury that requires immediate intervention. The Genetor Majoris and I are attempting to stop the flesh from dying off while simultaneously deciding on a strategy for further treatment."

{n}The medicae officer casts a glance at you.{/n} "I apologise, Lord Captain. The young man on the table has suffered a serious head injury that requires immediate intervention. We are now attempting to stop the flesh from dying off, but it is also necessary to choose a strategy for further treatment, and here we find ourselves in... significant disagreement."

{n}Martinax turns his head to you, still working his injector.{/n} "This young man has suffered a serious head injury that requires immediate intervention. The Genetor Majoris and I are attempting to stop the flesh from dying off while simultaneously deciding on a strategy for further treatment."

{n}The gloved medicae officer turns his head to you without removing his hands from the wound.{/n} "I apologise for the disorderly welcome, Lord Captain, but this young man has suffered a serious head injury that requires immediate intervention. My Genetor colleague and I are attempting to stop the flesh from dying off while simultaneously deciding on a strategy for further treatment."

{n}Still working the injector, Martinax turns his head to you.{/n} "This young man has suffered a serious head injury that requires immediate intervention. The Genetor Majoris and I are attempting to stop the flesh from dying off while simultaneously deciding on a strategy for further treatment."

languages.text: {n}医官があなたをちらっと見る.{/n} 「申し訳ありません、艦長様。テーブルの上の若者は、緊急処置が必要な重度の頭部外傷を負いました。私たちは現在、肉が腐敗しないように努めていますが、さらに治療を行う戦略を選ぶことも必要です。そして、ここに至るまでには... 重要な意見の相違が生じてしまいました」
languages.original_text: {n}The medicae officer casts a glance at you.{/n} "I apologise, Lord Captain. The young man on the table has suffered a serious head injury that requires immediate intervention. We are now attempting to stop the flesh from dying off, but it is also necessary to choose a strategy for further treatment, and here we find ourselves in... significant disagreement."

traits.locale_text: {n}医官があなたをちらっと見る.{/n} 「申し訳ありません、艦長様。テーブルの上の若者は、緊急処置が必要な重度の頭部外傷を負いました。私たちは現在、肉が腐敗しないように努めていますが、さらに治療を行う戦略を選ぶことも必要です。そして、ここに至るまでには... 重要な意見の相違が生じてしまいました。」

languages.text: {n}Tout en manipulant l'injecteur, Martinax tourne la tête dans votre direction.{/n} « Ce jeune homme a subi une grave blessure à la tête qui requiert un traitement immédiat. Le genetor majoris et moi-même tentons d'empêcher sa chair de mourir, tout en décidant d'une stratégie pour la suite de ses soins. »
languages.original_text: {n}Still working the injector, Martinax turns his head to you.{/n} "This young man has suffered a serious head injury that requires immediate intervention. The Genetor Majoris and I are attempting to stop the flesh from dying off while simultaneously deciding on a strategy for further treatment."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tout en manipulant l'injecteur, Martinax tourne la tête dans votre direction.{/n} « Ce jeune homme a subi une grave blessure à la tête qui requiert un traitement immédiat. Le genetor majoris et moi-même tentons d'empêcher sa chair de mourir, tout en décidant d'une stratégie pour la suite de ses soins. »

languages.text: {n}Hâlâ enjektörle uğraşırken Martinax başını sana çeviriyor.{/n} "Bu genç adam, anında müdahale gerektiren ciddi bir kafa travması geçirdi. Genetör Majoris ve ben, etin ölmesini durdurmaya çalışırken aynı anda daha sonraki tedavi için bir stratejiye karar veriyoruz."
languages.original_text: {n}Still working the injector, Martinax turns his head to you.{/n} "This young man has suffered a serious head injury that requires immediate intervention. The Genetor Majoris and I are attempting to stop the flesh from dying off while simultaneously deciding on a strategy for further treatment."

traits.locale_text: {n}Hâlâ enjektörle uğraşırken Martinax başını sana çeviriyor.{/n} "Bu genç adam, anında müdahale gerektiren ciddi bir kafa travması geçirdi. Genetör Majoris ve ben, etin ölmesini durdurmaya çalışırken aynı anda daha sonraki tedavi için bir stratejiye karar veriyoruz."

languages.text: {n}Martinax, der immer noch mit dem Injektor hantiert, wendet sich dir zu.{/n} "Dieser junge Mann hat eine schwere Kopfverletzung erlitten, die umgehend behandelt werden muss. Der Genetor Majoris und ich versuchen, ein Absterben des Fleischs zu verhindern, während wir uns auf eine Strategie zur weiteren Behandlung einigen."
languages.original_text: {n}Still working the injector, Martinax turns his head to you.{/n} "This young man has suffered a serious head injury that requires immediate intervention. The Genetor Majoris and I are attempting to stop the flesh from dying off while simultaneously deciding on a strategy for further treatment."

traits.locale_text: {n}Martinax, der immer noch mit dem Injektor hantiert, wendet sich dir zu.{/n} "Dieser junge Mann hat eine schwere Kopfverletzung erlitten, die umgehend behandelt werden muss. Der Genetor Majoris und ich versuchen, ein Absterben des Fleischs zu verhindern, während wir uns auf eine Strategie zur weiteren Behandlung einigen."

languages.text: {n}Sin dejar de manejar el inyector, Martinax se gira hacia ti.{/n} «Este joven ha sufrido una lesión craneal que requiere tratamiento inmediato. El genetor majoris y yo estamos intentando evitar que la carne muera mientras decidimos qué estrategia seguir para el tratamiento posterior».
languages.original_text: {n}Still working the injector, Martinax turns his head to you.{/n} "This young man has suffered a serious head injury that requires immediate intervention. The Genetor Majoris and I are attempting to stop the flesh from dying off while simultaneously deciding on a strategy for further treatment."

traits.locale_text: {n}Sin dejar de manejar el inyector, Martinax se gira hacia ti.{/n} «Este joven ha sufrido una lesión craneal que requiere tratamiento inmediato. El genetor majoris y yo estamos intentando evitar que la carne muera mientras decidimos qué estrategia seguir para el tratamiento posterior».

languages.text: {n}马丁纳克斯一边继续操作注射器，一边转过头来对你说：{/n}“这位年轻人的头部受了重伤，需要立即干预。我和高级基因士正试图阻止肉体坏死，同时商定后续的治疗方案。”
